name: M:GTA.World.CreateParticleEffectNonLooped(GTA.ParticleEffectAsset,System.String,GTA.EntityBone,GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.Math.Vector3,System.Single,GTA.InvertAxisFlags)
summary: Starts a Particle Effect on an

params.name: scale
params.description: How much to scale the size of the effect by.

params.name: invertAxis
params.description: Which axis to flip the effect in. For a car side exahust you may need to flip in the Y Axis
